section.heading: Certain property for which marital deduction was previously allowed

content.p: The value of the gross estate shall include the value of any property to which this section applies in which the decedent had a qualifying income interest for life.

subsection.heading: Property to which this section applies
subsection.chapeau: This section applies to any property if—

paragraph.chapeau: a deduction was allowed with respect to the transfer of such property to the decedent—

subparagraph.content: under section 2056 by reason of subsection (b)(7) thereof, or
under section 2523 by reason of subsection (f) thereof, and

paragraph.content: section 2519 (relating to dispositions of certain life estates) did not apply with respect to a disposition by the decedent of part or all of such property.

subsection.heading: Property treated as having passed from decedent

content.p: For purposes of this chapter and chapter 13, property includible in the gross estate of the decedent under subsection (a) shall be treated as property passing from the decedent.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 2044 was renumbered section 2045 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1983 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 97–448 effective, except as otherwise provided, as if it had been included in the provision of the Economic Recovery Tax Act of 1981, Pub. L. 97–34, to which such amendment relates, see section 109 of Pub. L. 97–448, set out as a note under section 1 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable to estates of decedents dying after Dec. 31, 1981, see section 403(e) of Pub. L. 97–34, set out as an Effective Date of 1981 Amendment note under section 2056 of this title.
